agent.name: TaskBot
agent.description: Monitors one Telegram group and keeps a Google Sheet task tracker up to date. Reads every message, detects task-related content, and calls the right tool automatically.

telegram.comment_groupPolicy: REQUIRED — allows ALL group members to trigger the agent. Without this, OpenClaw defaults to groupAllowFrom:[<deployer_id>] and silently drops everyone else's messages.

${TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_GROUP_ID}.comment_requireMention: Agent reads ALL messages in the group, not just @mentions. Required for passive task monitoring.

telegram.comment_groupAllowFrom: DO NOT set groupAllowFrom here. If set, only those sender IDs will trigger the agent — everyone else is silently dropped. The group binding is handled by TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_GROUP_ID above.
